# Forge
> Growth systems agency for GTA restaurants and local businesses

## About
Forge builds connected marketing systems that turn visibility into revenue. Based in Toronto, serving the Greater Toronto Area.

## Services
- SearchForge: SEO, Google Maps, AI visibility, listings, citations
- ContentForge: Video production, social media, photography
- WebForge: Conversion-optimized website design
- ReviewForge: Reputation management, review generation

## Contact
- Website: https://forge-co.ca
- Growth Audit: https://forge-co.ca/growth-audit/
